canonical_definition: The ability to deduce reachability relationships through the concatenation of path segments that were not directly observed in the training data.
papers: ALPINE: Unveiling The Planning Capability of Autoregressive Learning in Language Models

definitions.text: The ability to deduce a new relationship between two entities based on their relationships with a common intermediate entity (e.g., if A is a B, and B is a C, then A is a C).
